ul.li: Vector Database: Store document embeddings for fast similarity search
Embedding Models: Convert text to dense vector representations
LLM Engine: Generate responses based on retrieved context
Orchestration: Coordinate retrieval and generation workflows
Self-RAG: Models self-evaluate and refine responses
Corrective RAG: Dynamic quality assessment with web fallback
Agentic RAG: Multi-agent systems for complex reasoning
Multimodal RAG: Support for text, images, audio, and video
Chunking Strategy: Optimize chunk size for your domain (100-512 tokens)
Hybrid Search: Combine vector similarity with keyword search
Prompt Engineering: Design effective augmentation templates
Evaluation: Implement comprehensive metrics for continuous improvement
Caching: Multiple layers to reduce latency and costs
Load Balancing: Distribute requests across multiple instances
Async Processing: Handle long-running operations efficiently
Cost Optimization: Monitor and optimize LLM API usage
